author: lightclient
content: There is also gas limit and pricing info. This is all metadata related to the tx?

author: anderselowsson
content: But it does not leak, because the sender of the sealed transaction does not need to be the same as the sender of the revealed transaction. So you just know that someone wants to send a transaction with a certain gas limit, etc.

author: lightclient
content: being able to correlate the sponsor is still a form of metadata leakage

author: anderselowsson
content: Yeah you are referring to the ability to connect an account to other possible accounts that may have the same account holder? It becomes rather speculative though, because there is a cost to making probabilistic frontrunning attempts in the way the EIP is being designed.

author: potuz
content: that's far fetched, sponsor can be the wallet
